title: cottsia californica
intro: Cottsia californica, also known as California Cottontop or California Cottontop Mallow, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the Malvaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Cottsia californica include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Cottsia californica can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
